Risk Title: Ransomware spreads across ERP and production
Vulnerability: Flat network and backups on same network
Impact Description: Production stoppage shipment delays data loss and recovery cost
Key Existing Gaps: No segmentation no immutable offsite backup and no EDR

Risk Title: Phishing leads to M365 or VPN account takeover
Vulnerability: No MFA and no awareness training
Impact Description: Mailbox compromise fraud and lateral movement
Key Existing Gaps: No MFA weak awareness and shared admin practices

Risk Title: Lateral movement from corporate LAN into production LAN
Impact Description: Production outage and possible unsafe process interruption
Key Existing Gaps: Corporate production and guest traffic not adequately isolated

Risk Title: Backup encryption corruption or restore failure
Vulnerability: Backups stored online and not regularly tested
Impact Description: Inability to recover critical systems within business tolerance
Key Existing Gaps: No immutable copy and no formal restore testing

Vulnerability: Shared privileged accounts and poor accountability
Impact Description: Full infrastructure takeover and inability to trace actions
Key Existing Gaps: Shared admin passwords and no PAM controls

Risk Title: Lost or stolen laptop exposes company data
Vulnerability: No enforced disk encryption or remote wipe
Impact Description: Confidentiality breach and possible regulatory reporting
Key Existing Gaps: Inconsistent encryption and unmanaged mobile posture

Risk Title: Unpatched vulnerabilities exploited on servers or endpoints
Impact Description: Service disruption compromise or ransomware foothold
Key Existing Gaps: No formal patch cadence or vulnerability tracking

Risk Title: Supplier or partner compromise disrupts logistics or data exchange
Vulnerability: No supplier security requirements or review
Impact Description: Order disruption data integrity issues and downtime
Key Existing Gaps: No vendor due diligence or minimum security clauses

Risk Title: Business email compromise causes payment or procurement fraud
Vulnerability: Weak approval controls and no MFA
Impact Description: Financial loss and supplier relationship damage
Key Existing Gaps: No MFA and limited payment verification process

Impact Description: Attacker reaches internal systems from internet
Key Existing Gaps: No MFA and weak remote access hardening

Risk Title: Recipe or specification tampering leads to food safety or labeling error
Vulnerability: Weak change control and access restriction
Impact Description: Incorrect ingredients labels or batch release decisions
Key Existing Gaps: Limited segregation of duties and poor audit trail

Risk Title: Warehouse scanner or WMS malware disrupts inventory control
Impact Description: Stock inaccuracies dispatch delays and manual workarounds

Risk Title: Insider misuse or unauthorized privileged activity
Impact Description: Data theft sabotage or policy breach
Key Existing Gaps: No quarterly access review and weak accountability

Risk Title: Power failure fire or environmental issue in server room
Vulnerability: Single small on prem server room
Impact Description: Service outage hardware damage and recovery delay
Key Existing Gaps: Limited resilience and unclear environmental monitoring

Risk Title: Guest WiFi used as pivot into internal systems
Impact Description: Visitor device could access business systems

Vulnerability: No formal policies no risk register and weak evidence
Impact Description: GDPR issues customer findings or assurance failure

Risk Title: Security incident remains undetected too long
Vulnerability: No monitoring central logging or alerting
Impact Description: Greater blast radius longer downtime and higher breach cost
Key Existing Gaps: No monitoring process or alert ownership

Risk Title: Disaster recovery fails due to unclear roles and untested procedures
Vulnerability: No documented DR plan or exercise program
Impact Description: Extended outage missed deliveries and reputational harm
Key Existing Gaps: No approved DR plan BIA linkage or drills
